rules.text: Controller must not create Cmd/Res/ExcelRow, template rows, or private toXxx/parseXxx helpers. Put boundary conversions in interface assembler.
Application service should not accumulate large toDTO/toDomain conversion methods. Put domain-to-DTO mapping in application assembler.
Use normal Chinese strings in source. Do not add Unicode escapes just because PowerShell displays mojibake; fix only actual mojibake in the file.
After completing each independently usable module, verify it, stage only module-related files, and commit immediately with a Chinese commit message. Do not include unrelated local files.
平台能力用于可选项目能力，例如 SSE、WebSocket、MQ、Neo4j、Python Runtime。默认禁用；禁用时不得初始化外部连接、声明中间件资源或强制项目配置外部依赖，启用后由能力配置驱动运行时连接与健康检查。
接口加密、双 token、API Key、Passkey、OAuth 等安全身份能力归 system 域；SSE、WebSocket、MQ、Neo4j 等可插拔工程能力归 platform 域，并且必须支持动态启停以避免无用中间件冗余。
平台能力禁用时必须同步释放运行时资源，例如关闭 WebSocket/SSE 会话、RabbitMQ 连接工厂、Neo4j Driver 缓存；不能只改 enabled 状态。
除 platform:capability 能力管理入口外，平台功能菜单应在对应能力关闭时从 /api/menu/routes 隐藏；能力 Provider 必须保持懒初始化，关闭状态不能连接中间件。
插件用户侧资源归属必须由后端从当前会话/PluginPrincipal/Sa 上下文推导，前端不得传 uploaderId、ownerId 等可伪造归属字段；如需管理员代操作，应设计独立管理用例和权限。

Frontend plugin styles used by dashboard cards and runtime pages must be injected through the plugin inline stylesheet (styles.css?inline), and install() must update an existing style tag textContent instead of returning early. Dev fallback and remote reload can keep stale style tags, so do not rely only on component scoped CSS for plugin dashboard cards.

Record-style lists that can grow without a small fixed bound, such as operation records, transactions, logs, audit rows, and import histories, must expose page/size in plugin HTTP APIs and show frontend pagination instead of loading a fixed 100/200 rows.

Authlib Injector service endpoint stays under /api/plugins/authlib-injector. Derive meta.links, skinDomains, and ALI from the current public request/texture URL; do not replace the authlib service address with the skin texture/yggdrasil path unless explicitly requested.

PluginDocumentStore caps page size at 200; plugin backend all-list scans and cross-plugin aggregations must loop pages with a <=200 page size instead of requesting 1000/10000, and frontend plugin bundles must be rebuilt because dist is ignored but packaged into plugin JARs.

Java Long/Snowflake IDs must cross JSON, plugin HTTP, SDK, and TypeScript boundaries as strings. Do not expose them as frontend number fields or call Number(id), otherwise JavaScript precision loss will make selects/saves query the wrong backend record.
插件前端涉及人员、部门选择时，不得暴露用户 ID 输入框；用后端 picker API 搜索/解析用户并以姓名、用户名、邮箱标签展示，历史 ID 只允许作为搜索兼容入口。
插件前端涉及人员、部门、服务器等选择器时，不得让用户手输或辨认内部 ID；优先复用宿主 UI 框架组件，如 Arco Modal/Table/Select/Tag，并用名称、账号、部门、服务器名等业务标签展示。

Project progress check-in frequency is a natural time bucket, not a rolling interval. For 1440 minutes, count at least one check-in per local calendar day 00:00-24:00; manual check-ins may repeat, while automatic Minecraft check-ins should dedupe within the current bucket.

Project progress managers count as project members. Assigning, randomly assigning, publishing assigned tasks, or claiming a detail must add assignees to the project member set. Deleting a project or detail must cascade related details, check-ins, acceptance records, and progress events.

Project progress acceptance evidence must be stored as ProjectFileEvidence, shown with summary on completed/detail/review views, and previewed/downloaded through authenticated SDK blob calls rather than raw object keys or direct URLs. Personal/member stats count assigned details, done-status completed details, pending acceptance details, accepted/rejected acceptance records for assigned details, and project-level check-ins.

After official business plugins are split into a standalone repository, the core host frontend must not auto-glob packages/plugin-*/src/index.ts in DEV mode. Default behavior should load remoteEntry.js from backend plugin assets; any cross-repo local debugging bridge must be explicit and must not make the core workspace depend on migrated plugin source.

Use YuDream Nexus as the only package repository. Read Maven artifacts through maven-public; publish releases to maven-releases and snapshots to maven-snapshots. Publish and read @yudream/plugin-sdk and @yudream/components through npm-public. GitLab is limited to source hosting, CI execution, and CI artifacts; GitLab Package Registry and npmjs publishing are deprecated. Split plugin repositories consume contract versions from Nexus instead of inheriting the core root parent or workspace source.

The core repository root Maven reactor and GitLab CI must only build core modules plus yudream-plugin-spi. Business plugin modules may remain temporarily in the workspace for migration, but they should be treated as external repositories and runtime plugins loaded from the plugins/ directory instead of being part of the default core build.

Once official business plugins are migrated to yudream-admin-plugins, the core frontend pnpm workspace should keep only shared host packages such as components, plugin-sdk, dataviz, settings, and types. Do not keep packages/plugin-* in the default workspace manifest, or core install/build will still be implicitly coupled to migrated plugin source.

When shared frontend packages are renamed, update both source imports and generated auto-import/components d.ts references in core-arco-design-vue, otherwise CI vue-tsc may report missing modules and downstream implicit-any errors even if most source files already use the new package name.

插件菜单声明只用于首次初始化，以及 SYSTEM_SEED_MENU_SYNC_MODE=MISSING_ONLY 时按 Menu.code 补回缺失记录；首次初始化必须以插件记录中的持久化标记判断，不能用当前菜单是否存在来猜测。已有菜单和权限必须零写入，create-missing 遇到并发唯一键竞争后必须按 code 重读收敛。PluginFrontend.parentCode 指向共享父菜单时，不创建消费插件自己的模块目录，路由直接挂到该父级。启用只恢复 exact pluginCode 记录，停用/卸载/删除只隐藏 exact pluginCode 记录，禁止递归影响子菜单；隐藏持久化失败必须向调用方报错。系统菜单和插件菜单允许互相作为父级，生命周期只看节点自身 pluginCode。无显式权限的 CATEGORY/LAYOUT 是结构节点，应随有权限的子路由进入路由树，但显式父权限仍必须生效。插件专用排序接口/UI 禁止作为第二套菜单配置源。frontend-manifest 只提供远程模块加载元数据，菜单树、Layout、名称、图标、路由、权限、父级、显隐和状态统一以 /api/menu/routes 的持久化菜单为准；manifest 暂时不可用时仍应让 runtime-page 使用插件默认 remoteEntry。

Top-level menu activation must score every menu group: exact route match wins, otherwise the longest segment-boundary prefix wins. Never select the first prefix match because plugin route namespaces can overlap across configured parents.
凡保留持久化记录并将状态切换为 DISABLED、DEPRECATED 或 enabled=false 的软停用操作，必须提供显式且幂等的启用领域动作、应用用例、受权限保护 API 和前端入口；启用只恢复生命周期状态，不覆盖业务配置。真实删除、吊销、过期、下线/发布工作流不适用。

Plugin routes that require a contextual identifier, such as detail pages, editors, operation histories, or scoped statistics, should declare @PluginRoute(hideInMenu = true). The host must retain the route and Layout wrapper while projecting its menu entry with visible=false so it is reachable only from contextual navigation.

Plugin enable must reproject frontend menu declarations without overwriting existing menu fields. Any stale module:/parent:/route: registration from a removed declaration must be marked runtimeAvailable=false so contextual parent layouts do not survive upgrades as duplicate navigation entries.

Plugin JARs declare stable code in plugin.yml name and may declare a localized displayName for user-facing UI; displayName falls back to name and must never be used for depend/softdepend, routes, service lookup, or runtime identity. Plugin-owned APIs stay in the provider JAR; consumers use provided scope and direct context.service calls through dependency classloaders.

Rendered message layouts such as the Milky command menu must use classpath Thymeleaf templates. Java may only assemble view data and invoke TemplateEngine; do not concatenate HTML or CSS inside dispatcher methods.

When a render request includes a CSS selector, use Playwright Locator.screenshot() for the selected element. Do not emulate element screenshots with boundingBox plus page.screenshot clip or viewport resizing, because reflow can crop padding and borders.
AI gateway requests must explicitly mark structured CMS output; ordinary plugin/chat requests return natural-language content and must never enter CMS canvas JSON validation.

CMS AI structural mutations such as add-html, set-html, and replace-page must include CSS. The agent must call cms.canvas.validate with final HTML/CSS/JS and may finish only after valid=true; validation tools are read-only and must not be applied as frontend canvas mutations.

CMS 画布预览 JS 必须可重复初始化并可释放。addEventListener、setInterval、requestAnimationFrame、Three.js setAnimationLoop 等长生命周期资源必须通过 window.__YU_CMS_REGISTER_CLEANUP__ 注册对应 removeEventListener、clearInterval、cancelAnimationFrame、setAnimationLoop(null) 及 WebGL 资源 dispose；前端预览更新应防抖，普通 HTML/CSS 更新不得重跑整段页面 JS。

Agent applications are a standalone platform capability with an explicit provider, project gate, application gate, and AI/Integration dependencies; menus and endpoints must be bound to agent rather than only ai.
FaInput、FaTextarea、FaSelect 不渲染 label 属性；业务表单必须使用显式 label/字段标题，并提供 placeholder 或帮助文本。
固定高度的 Grid/Flex 工作台中，侧栏根节点必须设置 height:100%、min-height:0、overflow:hidden，内部内容区使用 min-height:0 和 overflow:auto，避免长工具列表被裁切。
Agent 调试前端必须通过 fetch ReadableStream 消费 POST SSE，并按 nodeId 映射节点状态；仅打印 AG-UI/SSE 日志或等待阻塞 /run 返回，无法实现实时画布反馈。
Agent 大模型节点必须持久化 providerCode/modelCode 和输入能力；llm/understand 只能引用当前已配置的 chat 模型，Vision 模型才允许图片输入，禁止静默回退到未配置的 Default AI。系统内置 Agent 启动时应修复历史上指向 embedding/rerank 或已删除模型的非法引用，但保留仍然合法的 chat 模型选择。
Agent 和平台文档文本提取必须依赖领域 DocumentTextExtractor 网关；基础设施使用 Apache Tika 在内存中解析 Data URL/Base64，并在解码前后执行输入格式、MIME 类型和最大字节数校验，禁止把 Tika 或临时文件逻辑放入应用服务。

Custom Python Agent tools expose def run(params: dict) -> dict. stdin/stdout are internal runtime IPC only and must not appear in tool authoring UI or tool payloads; persist an output JSON object example and reject non-dict results.

Structured Agent cards are emitted only in AG-UI streams as ACTIVITY_SNAPSHOT with activityType=agui-card. Ordinary Agent/non-stream responses keep raw structured output and must not render AG-UI cards.

Plugin-owned Agent applications must be declared as static plugin.yml agents with classpath workflow resources and projected into the runtime registry only. Enabling registers them; disable/unload disposes them immediately. Never seed plugin Agent applications into the host database, and never fall back to legacy persisted copies when the owning plugin is unavailable.

Agent SSE debug, CMS AG-UI compatibility streams, and plugin message execution must capture caller permission codes before crossing CompletableFuture/Reactor threads. Store an explicit permission snapshot on the boundary command, propagate it to AgentRunCmd, and make workflow/tool authorization consume it; never read Sa-Token or API-key ThreadLocal state from asynchronous worker threads.

utilities.example: const res = await apiExcel.exportUsers(params); saveExcelResponse(res, '用户管理.xlsx')
ExcelHttpSupport.write(response, "用户管理", "用户", UserExcelRow.class, rows);

utilities.text: Vue3 + Arco 动态表单优先使用 @form-create/arco-design 和 form-create-designer-arco-design；main.ts 全局 app.use(formCreate) 与 app.use(FcDesigner)，设计器用 fc-designer.getRule/getOption 保存 JSON，公开端用 form-create 渲染并自定义提交按钮。

pitfalls.text: User role assignment is department-scoped. Frontend and backend must avoid assigning roles outside the user's selected departments.
RustFS may reject S3 HeadBucket even when object operations can continue. Do not fail upload only because bucket head check is forbidden.

form-create designer rules are persisted as JSON, so function props such as upload onSuccess/customRequest are lost. Public/runtime dynamic form rendering must re-inject upload handlers, normalize backend file URLs for previews, and provide a public form-scoped upload endpoint instead of relying on the login-only common file upload API.
受保护的插件下载不能用 window.open 裸 URL；Sa-Token 只读请求头时浏览器直开不会带 Authorization。插件前端应通过宿主 SDK 的 blob/responseType=blob 请求下载，并从 Content-Disposition 解析文件名。
后端动态菜单树中 CATEGORY/LAYOUT 结构祖先只承载已授权后代，不得以自身 permission 二次阻断叶子权限；前端 backend route 模式不得把顶级 auth 覆盖到子路由，也不得在递归子节点前用结构父 auth 丢弃整支。BUTTON 权限应从持久化菜单上溯到所属页面，但不可用插件 BUTTON 不得授权页面。

When the backend runs on the host and the render service runs in Docker, compose must publish RENDER_PORT to the host with ports: " :3000\. Docker expose alone only permits container-network access; verify http://127.0.0.1:3000/health after recreation.

HTML menu rendering must preserve style tags, inline style attributes, and caller CSS exactly. Do not apply sanitize-html or CSS allowlists in the render server; isolation is provided by disabled JavaScript, CSP, and blocked document subresources.
图表类型必须由 chartType 明确判定。后端折线/柱状序列可能同时返回 nodes: [] 与 links: []；JavaScript 空数组为真，不能用 nodes && links 推断关系图，否则会丢弃 categories/values 并只渲染空坐标轴。
GrapesJS 默认会裁剪未命中组件的 CSS。CMS add-html 前端必须先插入 HTML，再应用 CSS/JS，所有 getCss 调用必须保留 keepUnusedStyles；后端 cms.canvas.block.add 与 cms.canvas.patch/add-html 必须拒绝 cssContent 未覆盖本次 HTML 全部 class 的调用。
Spring AI 工具调用完成后必须保留模型的最终自然语言文本；AiGenerationResult 不能因为 toolResults 非空而清空 summary/content。只显示工具完成状态会掩盖 web.fetch 等读取工具已经返回的分析结论。
CMS 首页最终完整性校验必须将 data-yb-chrome 固定 Header/Footer 及 site-builder-home 系统包装器排除出 AI CSS 覆盖检查；固定结构由 cms.chrome.style validate 负责，首页主体和 add-html 的 class 覆盖仍保持严格校验。
CMS AI 工具通过 SSE 在浏览器实时应用，服务端结束时只有修改前快照。模型遗漏 cms.canvas.validate 不能导致整个请求失败；仅在模型明确返回 valid=false 时阻断。最终实际画布校验应由浏览器侧状态或显式模型校验承担，不能在服务端用旧快照伪造。
Agent 运行和调试创建 AiGenerationRequest 时必须传入已启用 AI 能力的 providers 配置；仅传 providerCode/modelCode 且 config=Map.of() 会让网关回退到 Default AI 并误报 API Key 未配置。
